name: sebu-monorepo
//: npm workspaces root. `web` is deliberately NOT a workspace member yet — it keeps its own independent install + CI (cd web && npm ci). It migrates to @sebu/shared in a later PR. See .claude/plans mobile-app plan.
//overrides: Force a single React across the workspace — RN 0.81's Fabric renderer crashes if the app and @sebu/shared resolve different React copies (even different 19.x minors). react-test-renderer is pinned to the same version because @testing-library/react-native renders through it and npm's `react` override does NOT cascade to react-test-renderer — a mismatched minor throws the 'multiple copies of React' hook error under jest.
